Petition Of Adrew Koch To Determine Legitamacy Of Heirs
Off Calendar Jan-29-2025 Continued To Mar-26-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):

John Doyle, Esq., for Andrew Koch, Petitioner.
Nicholas Yang, Esq., for Theresa A. Eckert and Brian Dinsmore, co-Trustees.

At the court's query, each attorney offers an update of their respective positions regarding the status of this matter. There is a request to set an evidentiary hearing and/or a trial setting conference. The court advises that it typically does not set evidentiary hearings without first issuing a Case Management Order.

After additional discussion, the subject matters are continued to Mar-26-2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. A Trial Setting Conference is set for the same date and time.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

Petition Of Adrew Koch To Determine Legitamacy Of Heirs
Off Calendar Mar-11-2024 Continued To May-13-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
John Doyle, Esq., for Andrew Koch, Petitioner.
Daniel Spector, Esq., for Theresa Eckert, and Brian Dinsmore, co-Trustees.

At the outset, the court acknowledges Petitioner's recently filed objections. At the court's query, both counsel offer status of discovery. The court proposes continuing this matter for forty-five (45) days to allow for additional discovery and that it might issue a Case Management Order after the next hearing, depending on the position of the matter at that time.

The subject matter is continued to May-13-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. A Status of Discovery and Case Management Hearing shall be added to for the same date.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported.

Petition Of Adrew Koch To Determine Legitamacy Of Heirs
Off Calendar Jan-08-2024 Continued To Mar-11-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Doyle appeared by zoom for Andrew Koch (petitioner).
Nicholas Yang for Brian Dinsmore and Teresa Eckert (co-trustees/respondents).

Mr. Yang informed the court that he plans to file written objections. Discussion was held with respect to the unusual procedural history of the case, this petition being essentially the same as the one that was initially filed in another case number for which the examiner's notes were never addressed, the issue of Mr. Doyle looking to establish paternity, Mr. Doyle's belief that the Rallo case is the applicable law, but not dispositive of the case, the issue of there being an evidentiary hearing, the trustor not having been aware that he had a child, etc. Mr. Yang asked to be allowed to file a responsive pleading, to go forward with discovery and to come back for a trial setting conference. Mr. Yang also stated that he will conduct written discovery as soon as possible and requested 60 days. The Petition to Determine Legitimacy of Heirs is continued to March 11, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The court will then look into receiving a joint status report.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
